title: container status not reported through the docker api
body:
### Issue Description

Was trying to start a Milvus database through the script provided (https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/blob/master/scripts/standalone_embed.bat/https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/blob/master/scripts/standalone_embed.sh)

When waiting for the container to be up, podman ps reports the correct status for the container while docker ps reports an empty status

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. run the script


### Describe the results you received

The script is blocked waiting for the correct status

### Describe the results you expected

Script should exit successfully

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Is there a requirement that we support a Docker CLI running against a Podman API server?
@jeffmaury i think we need clarification.  Is this the docker binary running against a podman socket OR is this two different systems running the same script and behave differently.

> [@jeffmaury](https://github.com/jeffmaury) i think we need clarification. Is this the docker binary running against a podman socket OR is this two different systems running the same script and behave differently.

Yes the script(s) listed use the docker CLI binary. To be clear, I am running the script against a Podman machine
Do you know what the API diff you're requesting is? We don't work on the Docker client, so we'll need to know how our API response differs from theirs.
(A reproducer with curl or wget would be ideal)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
